name: MDZ Core
description: Core conformance profile for MDZ documents — the minimal manifest surface that every conformant archive MUST declare. A document that validates against mdz-core makes the strongest portability promise: it parses in every reference implementation, renders in every Capability Level >= 0 viewer, and survives JATS/EPUB export without data loss. Advanced features (signatures, content-addressing, provenance DAGs, multi-locale, etc.) are layered as separate profiles.
notes: v1.0 of the Core profile. Deliberately minimal — anything beyond these six required fields is opt-in. A document that validates against mdz-advanced-v1 also validates against mdz-core (mdz-advanced is a strict superset).
